subcodes.first_line: O thou remembrance of the Lord of the righteous and exemplar of the chosen ones! Thou art the token of that Master of the righteous and the remnant of that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها التذکار من سید الابرار و قدوه الاخیار تو یادگار آن سرور ابراری و بقیه آن
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @praise and encouragement
